commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Codex app-server projection of native and dynamic tool calls/results into mirrored session messages, allows `toolResult` through the transcript mirror, and adds focused projector/mirror tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: on current main, Codex `buildResult` never adds tool messages to `messagesSnapshot`, and the mirror would filter out `toolResult` anyway. I did not run a live Codex/ClawBench scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual review/contributor action is needed because the remaining blocker is real behavior proof plus draft/protected PR handling, not a narrow repair that automation can supply.
